UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BITOL, SOLANGE E. $8,677.19 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,084.65 INTEREST, $82.98 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,069.82

NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
